sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76949" key="pali/nouros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλίν-ουρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">οὖρον</etym>) <sense id="n76949.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making water again</tr_>, with play on pr. n. Palinurus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.78.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
